title: Lines To Miss  ---- , Accompanied By A Rose And A Lily.
content:
I look'd the fragrant garden round
    For what I thought would picture best
    Thy beauty and thy modesty;
    A lily and a rose I found, - 
    With kisses on their leaves imprest,
    I send the beauteous pair to thee.
meaning:
"Lines To Miss  ---- , Accompanied By A Rose And A Lily." is a quintessential example of John Carr (Sir)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
